___INSTRUCTIONS___: Add each schema block as a <script type='application/ld+json'> tag in your <head>. See the implementation guide for details.

schema_1_organization.name: Kurtis Boutique
schema_1_organization.description: Premium Indian women's boutique offering designer kurtis, kurtas, co-ords, festive wear, and maternity collections across India.

schema_3_online_store.name: Kurtis Boutique
schema_3_online_store.description: Shop designer kurtis, ethnic wear, co-ords & festive collections for women online in India.
schema_3_online_store.paymentAccepted: Credit Card, Debit Card, UPI, Cash on Delivery, Net Banking

itemListElement.name: Kurtis
itemListElement.description: Designer kurtis including A-line, Anarkali, straight, and printed styles

itemListElement.name: Co-ord Sets
itemListElement.description: Matching co-ord sets for women in ethnic and fusion styles

itemListElement.name: Festive Wear
itemListElement.description: Premium festive and party wear collections for women

itemListElement.name: Maternity Wear
itemListElement.description: Comfortable and stylish maternity ethnic wear

itemListElement.name: Combo Sets
itemListElement.description: Family combo sets, couple sets, and sibling matching collections

schema_5_breadcrumb_category_example.___NOTE___: Use this pattern for each category page, updating name and item URL

schema_6_product_example.___NOTE___: Use this template for EACH product page. Replace values dynamically from your product data.
schema_6_product_example.name: YOUR_PRODUCT_NAME

aggregateRating.___NOTE___: Only add this if you have real customer reviews

schema_7_faq_example.___NOTE___: Add FAQ schema to pages that have FAQ sections. Great for winning rich snippets.

mainEntity.name: Does Kurtis Boutique offer Cash on Delivery?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Kurtis Boutique offers Cash on Delivery (COD) across India along with online payment options including UPI, credit cards, and debit cards.

mainEntity.name: What types of kurtis are available at Kurtis Boutique?

acceptedAnswer.text: Kurtis Boutique offers a wide range including A-line kurtis, Anarkali kurtas, straight kurtis, printed kurtis, cotton kurtis, designer kurtis, co-ord sets, festive wear, maternity wear, and family combo sets.

mainEntity.name: Does Kurtis Boutique deliver all over India?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Kurtis Boutique delivers across India. We offer free delivery on qualifying orders with fast shipping typically within 3-7 business days.

mainEntity.name: What is the return policy at Kurtis Boutique?

acceptedAnswer.text: Kurtis Boutique offers easy returns and exchanges. Please check our Returns & Exchange policy page for detailed information on timelines and conditions.
